name: ran
description: Skills for the ran monorepo libraries — ranui (web components) and ranuts (utilities) — so AI can read and use them without spelunking the source. Install whichever you use.

plugins.name: ranui
plugins.description: ranui web-component library: import map, element inventory, builder/reactivity, accessibility, conventions.

plugins.name: ranuts
plugins.description: ranuts utility library: import map (utils/node/visual/vnode), ranuts/utils inventory, conventions.
